title: che pipeline
description: Declarative pipeline definition for che (https://github.com/chichex/che-cli). One file = one pipeline. The filename (without .json) is the pipeline name. The runtime engine, loader and label generator live in che — this schema only describes the on-disk shape.

$schema.description: Optional. URL pointing to this schema for IDE autocomplete (e.g. VSCode/Cursor). Ignored by the loader.

version.description: Schema version. Must be 1 in che v1 — the loader rejects unknown versions and asks for upgrade.

entry.description: Optional gate that runs before the steps. Receives the input (prompt/issue/PR) and emits a marker that picks the starting step ([goto: X]), proceeds to the first step ([next]) or rejects the input ([stop]).

steps.description: Ordered list of stages. The engine runs them top-to-bottom; jumps (forward or backward) are emitted by agents via [goto: <step_name>] markers. No flow-control metadata lives in this JSON.

stepName.description: Step identifier. Must match the same fragment used by the [goto: <name>] marker parser: lowercase letters / digits / underscores, starting with a letter or underscore.

agentRef.description: Reference to a built-in agent (claude-opus / claude-sonnet / claude-haiku) or a custom agent auto-discovered from .claude/agents/. Plugin agents use the namespaced form 'plugin:agent'.

aggregator.description: Policy for resolving conflicting markers when a step / entry has more than one agent. Default when omitted: 'majority'. See PRD §3.d for full semantics.

agents.description: Agents that run at this step. They run in parallel when more than one. Repeating the same agent yields N parallel instances of it.

_comment.description: Free-form comment ignored by the loader. The pipeline wizard injects these to document each step inline.
